title: Engine API: viewer element, src loading, diagnostics UI
description: Implement the 04-engine-api surface after Stage 4: <archmap-viewer>, external src with src_fetch_failed, diagnostics target/panel, SVG pan/zoom controls, and viewer UI state without reparsing.
triage_notes: Engine API started. Added first-pass inline <archmap-viewer>: initialize() defines it by default, defineArchMapViewerElement() is exported, and attributes base-view/overlays/width/height render inline source while base-view/overlay attribute changes reuse RenderResult mutators without reparsing. Added attribute parser helpers and tests. Verification: typecheck, test (84), build pass. Remaining: external src with src_fetch_failed, diagnostics target/panel, controls UI, SVG pan/zoom/fit/reset behavior.
